creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to admin from comment #5)

Well, in comment #3 you are writing

> $ mplayer 2015-02-20_21.mpg 
> MPlayer SVN-r37342-snapshot-3.4.1 (C) 2000-2014 MPlayer Team
>
> Playing 2015-02-20_21.mpg.

This implies that you have an actual file on your local drive that demonstrates this bug. Would it be possible for you to extract a couple of seconds from this file (e.g. with ffmpeg or mencoder) and upload this somewhere? This would allow me to reproduce the issue on my machine and debug the problem.
